mapper.select: SELECT faq.UFQ_NO AS ufq_no , faq.UFQ_QUESTION AS ufq_question , faq.UFQ_ANSWER AS ufq_answer , faq.UFQ_AM_USERID AS ufq_am_userid , DATE_FORMAT(faq.UFQ_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %h:%i') AS ufq_regdate FROM TBL_ZONE_FAQ faq ORDER BY faq.UFQ_REGDATE DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT COUNT(faq.UFQ_NO) AS count FROM TBL_ZONE_FAQ faq WHERE 1=1
AND ( faq.UFQ_QUESTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKey}, '%') OR faq.UFQ_ANSWER LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKey}, '%') )

select institution_bookers.UIB_YEAR AS uib_year , institution_bookers.UIB_MONTH AS uib_month FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_BOOKERS institution_bookers LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_BOOKERS_MEMBER institution_bookers_member ON institution_bookers.UIB_CODE = institution_bookers_member.UIM_UIB_CODE AND institution_bookers_member.UIM_UM_CODE = #{um_code} ORDER BY institution_bookers.UIB_REGDATE DESC LIMIT 1
select UM_CODE AS um_code , UM_USERID AS um_userid , UM_PWD AS um_pwd FROM TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member_master WHERE member_master.UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND member_master.UM_PWD = PASSWORD(#{um_pwd})
select UM_CODE AS um_code , UM_USERID AS um_userid , UM_PWD AS um_pwd FROM TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member_master WHERE member_master.UM_CODE = #{um_code}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER SET UM_PWD = PASSWORD(#{um_pwd}) ,UM_PW_CHANGE = 'Y' WHERE UM_CODE = #{um_code}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(member_device.UMD_CODE) AS count FROM TBL_MEMBER_DEVICE member_device WHERE 1=1 AND member_device.UMD_UM_CODE = #{um_code}

SELECT member_device.UMD_CODE AS umd_code , member_device.UMD_UID AS umd_uid , member_device.UMD_NAME AS umd_name , DATE_FORMAT(member_device.UMD_REGDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS umd_regdate FROM TBL_MEMBER_DEVICE member_device WHERE 1=1 AND member_device.UMD_UM_CODE = #{um_code}

SELECT COUNT(bookers_member.UIM_CODE) AS count FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_BOOKERS_MEMBER bookers_member LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_BOOKERS institution_bookers ON bookers_member.UIM_UIB_CODE = institution_bookers.UIB_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_AUTHORIZATION_TEMPLATE template ON institution_bookers.UIB_IAT_NO = template.IAT_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON bookers_member.UIM_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member_master ON bookers_member.UIM_UM_CODE = member_master.UM_CODE WHERE bookers_member.UIM_UM_CODE = #{um_code}

SELECT bookers_member.UIM_CODE AS uim_code , bookers_member.UIM_UIB_CODE AS uim_uib_code , bookers_member.UIM_UIS_CODE AS uim_uis_code , bookers_member.UIM_UM_CODE AS uim_um_code , bookers_member.UIM_READED AS uim_readed , bookers_member.UIM_READED_RMD AS uim_readed_rmd , bookers_member.UIM_READ AS uim_read , bookers_member.UIM_READ_RMD AS uim_read_rmd , bookers_member.UIM_REPORT AS uim_report , bookers_member.UIM_REPORT_RMD AS uim_report_rmd , bookers_member.UIM_POINT AS uim_point , bookers_member.UIM_ISSUED_YN AS uim_issued_yn , DATE_FORMAT(bookers_member.UIM_ISSUED_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uim_issued_date , bookers_member.UIM_CANCEL_YN AS uim_cancel_yn , bookers_member.UIM_CANCEL_DATE AS uim_cancel_date , bookers_member.UIM_PRINT_YN AS uim_print_yn , bookers_member.UIM_PRINT_DATE AS uim_print_date , bookers_member.UIM_UPDATEDATE AS uim_updatedate , bookers_member.UIM_REGDATE AS uim_regdate , institution_bookers.UIB_CODE AS uib_code , institution_bookers.UIB_UIS_CODE AS uib_uis_code , institution_bookers.UIB_IAT_NO AS uib_iat_no , institution_bookers.UIB_YEAR AS uib_year , institution_bookers.UIB_MONTH AS uib_month , DATE_FORMAT(institution_bookers.UIB_STARTDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS uib_startdate , DATE_FORMAT(institution_bookers.UIB_ENDDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS uib_enddate , institution_bookers.UIB_UIS_USERID AS uib_uis_userid , institution_bookers.UIB_REGDATE AS uib_regdate , institution_master.UIS_NAME AS uis_name , member_master.UM_NAME AS um_name , DATE_FORMAT(bookers_member.UIM_ISSUED_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uim_issued_date , member_master.UM_USERID AS um_userid , template.IAT_IMG AS iat_img , template.IAT_TEXT AS iat_text FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_BOOKERS_MEMBER bookers_member LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_BOOKERS institution_bookers ON bookers_member.UIM_UIB_CODE = institution_bookers.UIB_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_AUTHORIZATION_TEMPLATE template ON institution_bookers.UIB_IAT_NO = template.IAT_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON bookers_member.UIM_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member_master ON bookers_member.UIM_UM_CODE = member_master.UM_CODE WHERE bookers_member.UIM_UM_CODE = #{um_code} ORDER BY institution_bookers.UIB_REGDATE DESC LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_INSTITUTION_BOOKERS_MEMBER SET UIM_PRINT_YN = 'Y', UIM_PRINT_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE UIM_CODE = #{uim_code}
